'''Nanno L'a''' was a criminal who owned the technical data of all commissioners and petitioners that appeared before the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]]. He was friend of [[Didi Oddo]] and helped [[Astri Oddo]] to find [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Ona Nobis]].

==Behind the scenes==
Nanno L'a was created by [[Jude Watson]], and was first mentioned in ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Evil Experiment]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Evil Experiment]]'' {{1stm}}
